title: xo sessionslist — adapter-owned per-session index
description: One row per cowork session. Written by the runtime adapters (services/cowork_agent/adapters/claude_code/adapter.py, services/cowork_agent/adapters/openclaw/transcript.py) at session start AND on every subsequent usage update. NEVER written by agents (AGENTS.md §1) and NEVER written by the watcher — the watcher keeps its augmenting fields in the sibling `sessions-augment.json` file (see docs/watcher-design.md §3.7). The top-level object is keyed by the composite session id `<backend>:<agent_id>:<surface>:<8hex>` produced by the adapter (e.g. `claude:blackhole:web:67a1ac06`).

sessionId.description: Cowork session UUID written by the adapter at session start (`adapters/claude_code/adapter.py:121`). DIFFERENT from the composite top-level key, which is `<backend>:<agent_id>:<surface>:<8hex>`. The composite key is the row's true identity; this inner UUID is used by some legacy lookups.

nativeSessionId.description: The runtime's own session id (e.g. Claude Code's per-jsonl UUID). May be empty string before the runtime has emitted its first event.

directory.description: Absolute path to the project the session is running in. Stored for adapter use; STRIPPED before any BFF response (see docs/watcher-design.md §7.3).

backend.description: Runtime that owns this session, e.g. `claude_code`, `openclaw`, `hermes`. Open string — adding a new agent should not require a schema edit.

updatedAt.description: Epoch milliseconds of the most recent adapter write to this row.
